freshness_window: fixture only; rerun before default promotion
regression_results: support-state promotion remains blocked without evidence
residual_escrow: no local routing benchmark has been run
quarantine_conditions: promotes source-reported claims as reproduced results
fallback_path: Use human-reviewed source queues and keep support at argument.
expiry: when source inventory, source-note coverage, or claim-support policy changes
next_review_trigger: Implement routing and residual escrow tests before stronger promotion.
non_claims: does not prove readiness transition enforcement
does not promote any module to default
